applied.title: Regression tests must reproduce the real bug input shape
Tests claiming no CLI invocation must prove it with a sentinel
Config-derived or external paths must be confined to the vault root
Runtime behavior changes must be reflected in developer docs
Date format token support must be explicit and tested

findings.title: Date format token support must be explicit and tested
findings.message: Avoid unreachable Korean-character checks on ASCII regex tokens.

check.message: Avoid unreachable Korean-character checks on ASCII regex tokens.
